user.title: AwqatSalah – Connection & Authentication
user.description: Enter your API URL and authentication headers. Header 1 is required (e.g. X-API-Key). Header 2 is optional (e.g. for username/password based APIs).

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to API. Check URL and network.
error.header1_required: Header 1 name and value are required.
error.cannot_fetch_countries: Connected, but could not load country list.
error.cannot_fetch_states: Could not load regions for this country.
error.cannot_fetch_cities: Could not load cities for this region.
